error_chain: User runs terraform plan with an AWS resource configuration
Terraform core evaluates the configuration and calls provider plugin
terraform-provider-aws receives the plan request via gRPC
Provider validates resource attributes in internal/service validation
Provider returns validation error via gRPC to Terraform core
Terraform core formats and displays the error with provider attribution
trigger_conditions: Resource configuration uses a deprecated or invalid attribute combination
Provider-side validation catches the invalid combination in CustomizeDiff or Validate
The error message from the provider is generic and doesn't indicate which specific attribute pair conflicts
